title: Q1 2026 Data Retention Policy (Revised)
body:
**Purpose and Scope**

This Data Retention Policy establishes TechCorp's framework for retaining, managing, and securely disposing of data across all systems, products, and operations. The policy applies to all employees, contractors, vendors, and third parties acting on behalf of TechCorp who collect, process, or maintain company or customer data. This policy ensures compliance with applicable data protection regulations, including GDPR, CCPA, and emerging 2026 privacy frameworks, while supporting operational and business continuity requirements.

**Data Retention Categories and Periods**

TechCorp retains different categories of data for periods justified by legal obligation, contractual requirement, or legitimate business purpose. The following retention schedule is effective as of Q1 2026:

• **Customer Account and Transaction Data**: Retained for the duration of the customer relationship plus three (3) years following account termination or contract expiration, to satisfy accounting, dispute resolution, and tax compliance requirements.

• **Anonymized Analytics Data**: Retained for eighteen (18) months from the date of collection. This revision from the previous retention period of twenty-four (24) months reflects updated regulatory expectations regarding the storage of anonymized behavioral data and aligns with privacy-by-design principles. Anonymization must render data incapable of identification per GDPR Article 4 and emerging 2026 regulatory guidance; analytics data that retains re-identification risk shall be classified as personal data and subject to shorter retention periods.

• **Personally Identifiable Information (PII) – User Account Data**: Retained while the customer relationship is active. Upon account closure or customer deletion request, PII shall be securely deleted or irreversibly anonymized within thirty (30) days, except where legal holds, litigation, or regulatory audit obligations apply.

• **System and Security Logs**: Retained for twelve
